sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n26831" key="*dii/ktunna" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Διίκτυννα</orth>, coined (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἀπὸ τοῦ διικνεῖσθαι</etym>) as etym. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Δίκτυννα</foreign> by <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0654.tlg002:34" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Corn.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">ND</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">34</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
